name: procurement teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/week tool
description: For procurement teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/week, delayed alerts cause late orders. We automate overdue alerts instead of manual tracking of payment statuses.
target_audience: procurement teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/week
problem_solved: Overdue vendor payments due to lack of timely alerts.
features: weekly email alerts for overdue payments
manual entry option for invoice updates
